hub_subtitle: Business English from the ground up -- your work, your team, your routine

lesson.menu_desc: Running a simple Q&A with a colleague -- 29 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 7 -- Asking & Answering Questions -- Running a Q&A
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Danilo Febba | Aula 7 -- Asking & Answering Questions

listenings.text: Hi everyone, thanks for your questions about the new project. Let me give you the details. First, who is on the team? The project has five people. I am the lead, and Rachel is the product manager. Second, what does the project do? It builds a new data platform for the company. It collects information from many systems and puts it in one place. Third, when does it start? We start next Monday, and the first version is ready in three months. And why is this project important? Because right now our data is slow and hard to find. The new platform gives everyone fast, clear answers. If you have more questions, just send me an email. Thanks for listening!
